hero.bio: Building performant, accessible web experiences with React, TypeScript & Node.js.

about.heading: Professional Bio
about.body: Software Engineer specializing in building modern, scalable web applications using JavaScript, React, and Node.js. Passionate about clean code, performance optimization, and delivering high-quality user experiences.

items.title: Front-end Developer
description: Completed a summer training program at Mansoura University, gaining hands-on experience in full-stack web development.
Built and maintained applications using modern web technologies, with a focus on clean code, problem-solving, and real-world development practices.

items.title: Front-end Developer
description: Built a complete web platform including a public website and an admin dashboard.
Worked in an Agile team environment, collaborating on planning, implementation, and iteration cycles.
Focused on building responsive UI components, managing application state, and integrating dynamic data.

items.title: Frontend Developer Trainee
description: Contributing to the development of fintech solutions across mobile and web applications within the React ecosystem.
Assisting in building and refining features for the company's mobile application using React Native.
Collaborating on two core web platforms using React.js, ensuring high performance and scalable architecture.
Writing clean, maintainable code with TypeScript and participating in code reviews to align with industry best practices.
Integrating APIs, resolving Sentry-reported issues, and ensuring smooth feature deployments.
